payload.label: dining table
payload.long_description: Close-up of a reddish-brown polished wooden rectangular dining table top with visible wood grain and plank seams, slight surface sheen and a lighter patch near the upper right; edges and nearby chairs are partially cropped — estimated camera distance about 0.7 m.
